content: Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 2: Install backend dependencies (jwt, bcrypt, reportlab)
Phase 2: Install frontend dependencies (recharts, lucide-react, axios, react-router-dom)
Phase 2: Build backend - models, auth, CRUD endpoints, VAT calc, PDF gen, analytics
Phase 2: Build frontend - dark SaaS shell, auth pages, dashboard, clients, quotations, invoices, projects, payments, settings
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development
Phase 3: Fix all bugs found by testing agent
